summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification for 40 hydrated PRs. No GitHub mutations are performed. The validator reported four refs as security-sensitive despite the provided compacted preflight saying security_sensitive=false/no security-sensitive items, so only those four actions are downgraded to non-mutating needs_human for exact security-preflight reconciliation; three open PRs remain recommended for superseded closeout against hydrated canonical PRs, one already-closed PR is skipped, and the rest are kept independently for normal review.
